properties.name: auth.service.url
properties.description: Base URL of the authentication service (e.g. http://localhost:8080).

properties.name: jwt.secret
properties.description: Base64-encoded secret key used to sign and verify JWT tokens. Must match across all services.

properties.name: rate-limit.requests-per-minute
properties.description: Maximum number of requests allowed per minute per client before rate limiting kicks in.

properties.name: mpesa.daraja.shortcode
properties.description: M-Pesa business shortcode (paybill or till number).

properties.name: mpesa.daraja.passkey
properties.description: M-Pesa Lipa Na M-Pesa Online passkey used to generate the STK push password.

properties.name: mpesa.daraja.callback-url
properties.description: Publicly accessible HTTPS URL that Safaricom will POST STK push and B2C callbacks to. Use ngrok locally.

properties.name: mpesa.daraja.environment
properties.description: Daraja environment to target: 'sandbox' for testing, 'production' for live.

properties.name: stripe.secret-key
properties.description: Stripe secret API key (sk_test_* for sandbox, sk_live_* for production). Found in the Stripe Dashboard under Developers → API keys.

properties.name: stripe.webhook-secret
properties.description: Stripe webhook signing secret (whsec_*) used to verify incoming webhook payloads. Found in Stripe Dashboard → Webhooks → your endpoint → Signing secret.

properties.name: paypal.client-id
properties.description: PayPal REST API client ID. Found in the PayPal Developer Dashboard under your app credentials.

properties.name: paypal.client-secret
properties.description: PayPal REST API client secret. Found in the PayPal Developer Dashboard under your app credentials.

properties.name: paypal.environment
properties.description: PayPal environment to target: 'sandbox' for testing, 'production' for live.

properties.name: frontend.url
properties.description: Frontend application URL used for CORS allowed-origins configuration.

values.description: Safaricom Daraja sandbox environment for testing.
Suppresses hostname resolution warnings from Spring Cloud.
